title: Three More Iranian Soccer Players Withdraw Bid for Asylum in Australia
summary_full: Seven members of the national women’s team had sought refuge in the country after they were labeled “traitors” at home. Four of them have since changed their minds.
summary_public: Seven members of the national women’s team had sought refuge in the country after they were labeled “traitors” at home. Four of them have since changed their minds.
